texto: It’s common in the middle of a drought . . . to forget that rain is the norm. Or in the middle of a flood to forget that floods rarely happen. Or when bad news comes from the doctor to forget that, for most of us, this comes after many years of relatively good health.
explicacao: Citação de Mark Mittelberg sobre temas ligados a fe. “It’s common in the middle of a drought . . . to forget that rain is the norm. Or in the middle of…” articula fe, blessings, chrisitanity em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e chrisitanity.
